05月21日.zh_des: 使用可组合的FSDP和PEFT方法微调Meta Llama3的脚本，以涵盖单节点/多节点GPU。支持摘要和问答等应用程序的默认和自定义数据集，支持多种坦率的推理解决方案，如用于本地或云部署的HF TGI、VLLM。演示应用程序以展示用于WhatsApp和Messenger的Meta Llama3。
05月21日.name: meta-llama /llama-recipes
05月21日.description: Scripts for fine-tuning Meta Llama3 with composable FSDP & PEFT methods to cover single/multi-node GPUs. Supports default & custom datasets for applications such as summarization and Q&A. Supporting a number of candid inference solutions such as HF TGI, VLLM for local or cloud deployment. Demo apps to showcase Meta Llama3 for WhatsApp & Messenger.

05月21日.name: Nixtla /nixtla
05月21日.description: TimeGPT-1: production ready pre-trained Time Series Foundation Model for forecasting and anomaly detection. Generative pretrained transformer for time series trained on over 100B data points. It's capable of accurately predicting various domains such as retail, electricity, finance, and IoT with just a few lines of code 🚀.
